rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type contracts in component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for implementation-level output assignments
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when modifying models
Scope AGREE contracts appropriately for component types and implementations
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
Preserve existing AADL properties and connections
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level output assignments
Use `guarantee "label": expression;` for output dependency contracts
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved references
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
